itemIndex.description: Index that identifies the position of this item in the original array, starting from `0`.

slaId.description: Shipping method of the [shipping policy](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/shipping-policy--tutorials_140) used in the order.

deliveryChannel.description: Order shipping type, which can be `pickup-in-point` for [pickup point](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/pickup-points--2fljn6wLjn8M4lJHA6HP3R), and `delivery` for delivery.

price.description: Shipping price for the item in cents. Does not account for the whole order's shipping price.
